displayTitle: From Tool Bag to Automated Bench

beats.narration: Magnetic particle physics wears three bodies: a portable yoke in your bag, a mobile power pack on wheels, and a stationary wet bench.

payload.title: EQUIPMENT CLASSES
payload.sub: The same physics in three different bodies.

beats.narration: Three questions sort the hardware: where is the part, how much amperage, and how many parts per hour?

tiles.s: If it can't come, you go

beats.narration: Same circuits, different scale: portable packs near fifteen hundred amperes, mobile units roll two to six thousand to the work, benches add fixtures and bath.
Automation locks the sequence: clamp, flood the part, fire two half-second shots while the draining bath still lets particles move, then viewing, demag, unload.

payload.heading: Automation locks the sequence
payload.note: FIRE WHILE THE BATH DRAINS · PARTICLES MOBILE

beats.narration: Monitors compare every shot to limits. When an alarm fires, every part since the last good verification is suspect — retest them all.

payload.sub: Back to the last good verification.
